scripts.build:auto: if [ -n "$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY" ]; then node scripts/setup-auth.mjs && convex deploy --cmd 'next build'; elif [ -n "$NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL" ]; then echo "No CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY — building frontend against existing NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL (backend not redeployed)." && next build; elif [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ]; then echo "Missing CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY and NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL; set one in Vercel env." && exit 1; else next build; fi
